stories.headline: Iran war live: Israel kills 31 in Lebanon; Tehran blasts US truce violation
stories.summary: Lebanon's Health Ministry reports that Israeli attacks have killed 3,213 people and injured 9,737 since March 2.

stories.headline: Base Metals Advance as US Touts Progress Toward Iran Peace Deal
stories.summary: Copper climbed and aluminum was on track for its highest close in four years on cautious optimism that the US and Iran could reach a peace deal, despite a fresh flare-up of hostilities in the Persian Gulf.

stories.headline: MAGA candidate Paxton defeats Senate stalwart Cornyn in Texas primary
stories.summary: The president’s preferred candidate, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, has faced numerous scandals, while Sen. John Cornyn failed to excite the base.

stories.summary: The race will help determine whether Democrats can win back control of the US Senate for the last half of the Trump presidency.

stories.headline: UN chief ‘deeply concerned’ by Moscow plan for Kyiv strikes
stories.summary: UN Secretary-General Guterres said he was “deeply concerned” after Russia announced plans to strike Ukraine.

stories.headline: 5 Things to Know About Ken Paxton, the Republican Senate Nominee in Texas

stories.headline: 5 Things to Know About John Cornyn, Republican Senate Hopeful in Texas
stories.summary: He is fighting for political survival against a primary challenger backed by President Trump.

stories.headline: Samsung Workers Accept Wage Deal That Averts Chip Plant Strike
stories.summary: Samsung Electronics Co. union members voted in favor of a compensation deal that will hand chip workers an average bonus of about $340,000, staving off a strike that threatened to disrupt global chip supply.

stories.headline: First Ghanaians set to be repatriated from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests

stories.headline: Adnoc Exports Another LNG Shipment Through Hormuz to India
stories.summary: Another tanker carrying liquefied natural gas from Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. has exited the Strait of Hormuz, adding to a recent uptick in energy flows through the vital waterway.

stories.headline: ASX Shares Eye Decade Low After Cost Woes Fuel Profit Downgrades
stories.summary: ASX Ltd. shares have tumbled to their lowest level in almost a decade after rising costs prompted several brokers to trim their earnings outlooks for Australia’s beleaguered exchange operator.

stories.headline: Korean Stocks Surge 100% in 2026 to Surpass Dotcom Era Gains
stories.summary: The breathtaking rally in South Korean stocks took gains for 2026 to 100%, eclipsing even the historic run-ups seen before the dotcom bubble burst and during the nation’s industrial boom in the late 1980s.

stories.headline: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix, Micron Into $1 Trillion Club
stories.summary: The breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks is intensifying, sending the market capitalizations of SK Hynix Inc. and Micron Technology Inc. above $1 trillion for the first time, as investors bet the AI boom will lead to a sustained revaluation of the industry.

stories.headline: UBS' Khan on China Business, AI Impact and Middle East (Full Interview)

stories.headline: China Bond Bears Eye Niche Swap Trade as Rally Doubts Grow
stories.summary: Chinese investors are betting a months-long rally in two-year government bonds has gone too far, turning to arbitrage trades more commonly used in the US and Europe to put that view to work.

stories.summary: Carlos De La Cruz, a first-time candidate, defeated a moderate rival in a U.S. House district that was redrawn to favor Republicans, but where Democrats see an opportunity.
